hooks.prompt: Review the changes made in this session. Read docs/features.md and compare it against the actual code changes. Block if any of the following are true: (1) A new user-facing feature, keyboard shortcut, behavior, or option was added but is not documented in docs/features.md. (2) An existing feature was changed or removed but docs/features.md still describes the old behavior. (3) README.md needs updating for significant new features. Do NOT block for: bug fixes that don't change documented behavior, refactoring, internal improvements, test changes, or dependency updates. When in doubt, block. If updates are needed, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "Docs update needed: [what to add/change in which file]"}. Otherwise respond {"ok": true}.
